characters.name: KARU
characters.description: Väike pruun karupoeg pehme karvaga, kandmas rohelist salli. Tal on suured sõbralikud silmad ja naeratav nägu. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: REBANE
characters.description: Väike punakasoranž rebasepoeg, valge kõhu ja sabaotsaga, kandmas sinist mütsi. Tal on teravad, uudishimulikud silmad ja mänguline ilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: MÄNGUTOAS
locations.description: Cozy children's playroom with light blue walls and a warm wooden floor. There's a small, round wooden table in the center with two small chairs. A single window on the back wall shows a view of green trees outside. A small shelf with colorful books is on the left wall. Bright, cheerful lighting from the window. Cartoon style.

locations.name: ÕUES AIAS
locations.description: Sunny spring garden with bright green grass and a small, clear puddle reflecting the sky. A few early spring flowers (like crocuses or snowdrops) are visible near the edge of the grass. Distant green trees in the background under a blue sky. Bright, natural sunlight. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Karu sits on a small chair at the round wooden table in the playroom, holding a colorful piece of paper and smiling. Rebane sits opposite him, also at the table, looking at Karu with an eager expression. The playroom has light blue walls, a wooden floor, a window showing green trees, and a bookshelf with books. Bright, cheerful lighting. Landscape orientation.

Karu and Rebane are both looking down at the colorful piece of paper on the round wooden table in the playroom, with excited and thoughtful expressions. Rebane points to the paper with one paw. The playroom details (light blue walls, wooden floor, window, bookshelf) are consistent. Bright, cheerful lighting. Landscape orientation.

Karu and Rebane are actively engaged in folding a piece of colorful paper on the round wooden table in the playroom. Karu is carefully creasing a fold, and Rebane is watching intently, ready to help. The playroom environment is consistent. Bright, cheerful lighting. Landscape orientation.

Close-up on Rebane, sitting at the round wooden table in the playroom, with a focused and determined expression as he carefully folds a part of the colorful paper boat. Karu is watching him with a supportive smile. The partially folded boat is visible on the table. The playroom environment is consistent. Bright, cheerful lighting. Landscape orientation.

Karu sits at the round wooden table in the playroom, holding a colorful crayon and drawing patterns on the now folded paper boat. Rebane watches with an admiring smile. The finished boat has colorful details. The playroom environment is consistent. Bright, cheerful lighting. Landscape orientation.

The colorful, finished paper boat sits prominently on the round wooden table in the playroom. Karu and Rebane stand beside the table, admiring their creation with proud smiles. The playroom environment is consistent. Bright, cheerful lighting. Landscape orientation.

Karu carefully carries the colorful paper boat in his paws, walking through a sunny spring garden. Rebane trots excitedly beside him, looking towards a small, clear puddle ahead. Green grass, distant trees, and a bright blue sky are visible. A few early spring flowers are near the grass edge. Bright, natural sunlight. Landscape orientation.

The colorful paper boat is gently floating in a small, clear puddle in the sunny spring garden. Karu and Rebane are kneeling beside the puddle, watching the boat with delighted expressions. The puddle reflects the blue sky. Green grass, distant trees, and spring flowers are consistent. Bright, natural sunlight. Landscape orientation.

Karu and Rebane stand next to the puddle where their paper boat is happily floating. They are both smiling broadly and looking at each other, their faces filled with joy. The sunny spring garden, green grass, distant trees, and spring flowers are consistent. Bright, natural sunlight. Landscape orientation.
